channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Vancouver Developer Sentenced to 40 Days for Contempt Over Financial Disclosures
item.description: Helen Chan Sun, a prominent Vancouver real estate developer and sole shareholder of Landmark Premiere Properties Ltd., has been sentenced to 40 days in jail for contempt of court after repeatedly fail...

item.title: Federal Government considers extending fuel excise cut as Australia’s fuel reserves improve
item.description: Australia’s Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has signalled that the government may reassess the temporary fuel excise cut as the nation’s fuel reserves continue to grow. The current halving of the exci...

item.title: Delta Goodrem emerges as strong contender at Eurovision 2026
item.description: Australian singer Delta Goodrem is generating significant buzz at the Eurovision Song Contest 2026, quickly becoming a favourite among fans and industry insiders. While Finland remains the bookies’ to...

item.title: How the release of Epstein files has reinforced existing conspiracy narratives
item.description: The death of Jeffrey Epstein in prison on 10 August 2019 quickly became the subject of intense speculation. Just 38 minutes before ABC News reported the story, an anonymous user on the online forum 4C...

item.title: Salon Columnist Accuses FBI Director Kash Patel of Selectively Investigating Female Journalists
item.description: A Salon columnist has highlighted what she describes as a pattern of FBI investigations targeting female journalists who have published critical stories about FBI Director Kash Patel. According to the...

item.title: NYT Reporter Defends Press Freedom After Trump's Treason Accusation
item.description: New York Times reporter David Sanger responded to President Donald Trump's public criticism after being labeled 'treasonous' for his reporting on U.S. military actions in Iran. During a confrontation ...

item.title: Lilepo Scores Winner for Chiefs Before Being Sent Off as Relegation Battle Intensifies
item.description: Glody Lilepo had a dramatic day at the Moses Mabhida Stadium in Durban, scoring the decisive goal for Kaizer Chiefs against AmaZulu FC, only to be sent off immediately after for removing his shirt dur...

item.title: Orlando Pirates held to a draw by Durban City, league title race goes to final match
item.description: Orlando Pirates missed a golden opportunity to edge closer to their first league title in 14 years after being held to a goalless draw by Durban City at Orlando Stadium. The match, played in front of ...

item.title: Patrick Cripps leads Carlton to crucial win over Western Bulldogs
item.description: Carlton secured a much-needed victory against the Western Bulldogs, with Patrick Cripps delivering a standout performance reminiscent of his Brownlow-winning years. The Blues overcame an eight-point d...

item.title: Insurance as a Key Tool for East Africa’s Economic Growth and Resilience
item.description: Africa Re, the pan-African reinsurance company, is calling on governments in East Africa to start seeing insurance and reinsurance as critical tools for economic development, not just financial produc...

item.title: Kenyan-Born US Army Officer Gladys Kipsang Promoted to Major After 13 Years of Service
item.description: Kenyans continue to shine abroad, and one remarkable story comes from Gladys Kipsang, a Kenyan-born officer in the United States Army. After serving diligently for 13 years, she has been officially pr...

item.title: Orlando Pirates Held to Draw, Title Decided in Final Match
item.description: Orlando Pirates faced Durban City at Orlando Amstel Arena in their penultimate PSL match of the 2025/26 season, hoping to secure their first league title in 15 years. Despite a vibrant atmosphere and ...

item.title: APC Concludes House of Reps Primaries in Katsina, Produces Elected and Consensus Candidates
item.description: The All Progressives Congress (APC) for Katsina State don complete their primaries for House of Representatives seats ahead of the 2027 elections. For Mani/Bindawa Federal Constituency, Hajiya Jamila ...

item.title: Pasay Police Chief Confirms Solo Police Vehicle Left Senate Early Morning
item.description: Pasay City Police Chief Colonel Joselito De Sesto confirmed that he was the passenger in the white police vehicle that left the Senate premises at around 3 a.m. on May 14, 2026. He clarified that the ...

item.title: Behind-the-Scenes Portraits of Shirley MacLaine Filming Irma la Douce in 1963
item.description: These evocative behind-the-scenes portraits capture actress Shirley MacLaine during the production of the 1963 classic film Irma la Douce, directed by Billy Wilder. MacLaine stars as Irma, a spirited ...

item.title: Genus Group secures $200m equity to acquire MPC Kinetic
item.description: Genus Group, a rapidly growing infrastructure company based in Western Australia and a key player in the nation’s energy transition, has quietly raised equity to finance the acquisition of private equ...

item.title: Semenyo’s Brilliant Back-Flick Secures Manchester City FA Cup Victory Over Chelsea
item.description: For Saturday wey just pass, Antoine Semenyo show proper skill as e score one kind magnificent back-flick wey settle Manchester City 1-0 win against Chelsea for FA Cup final for Wembley. This goal na t...

item.title: Semenyo’s decisive goal earns Manchester City FA Cup victory over Chelsea
item.description: Manchester City secured a 1-0 victory over Chelsea in the FA Cup final at Wembley, thanks to a moment of brilliance from Antoine Semenyo in the second half. In a tightly contested match with few clear...

item.title: Suspected Drunk Driver to Face Charges After Reckless Crash Injures Motorcyclist
item.description: Authorities in Klang, Malaysia, are set to formally charge a man suspected of driving under the influence after a serious traffic incident left a motorcyclist critically injured. The suspect, a man in...

item.title: Kericho Family Mourns Loss of Nurse Daughter Who Passed After Short Illness
item.description: A family in Ainamoi, Kapkwen Village, Kipchimchim, Kericho County is grieving after losing their beloved daughter, Mercy Chepkirui, who worked as a nurse in Nairobi. Mercy tragically passed away on Th...
